name: MARINEMAX INC
business: The company sells new and used recreational boats, yachts, and related marine products including engines, trailers, parts, and accessories. It also provides boat financing, insurance, repair and maintenance services, and yacht brokerage. Additionally, it offers slip and storage accommodations and operates charter, superyacht services, and marina operations.

exposures.sentence: We believe we are the world's largest recreational boat and yacht retailer, marina operator and superyacht services company.
